title: pteris cretica var. intermedia
intro: Pteris cretica var. intermedia, also known as the Indian fern or bracken fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, among others. In herbal preparations, Pteris cretica var. intermedia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
